project: Antibody sequence ML and existing-record prioritization

validation.primary_strategy: grouped validation where group features are meaningful

benchmark_interpretation.safe_public_interpretation: Sparse k-mer/CDR-local features were more robust than pretrained representation benchmarks in the matched/noisy public-label context.

prioritization.claim_boundary: Existing-record prioritization only; no therapeutic design.

limitations: OAS is unknown-target background, not true negatives
no therapeutic design, sequence generation, mutation, or optimization
